title: Independent replication agreement

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: Replication2 reproduced corrected N=53 direction, verifying implementation soundness while leaving robustness and specificity unresolved.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: Implementation reproduction is not equivalent to predictive-utility validation.

statistics_notes: Bars show corrected Phase 7 and replication2 estimates; labels mark directional reproduction.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: Implementation reproduction is not equivalent to predictive-utility validation.
